name: DiversiFi
tagline: Protecting global wealth through culturally-aware AI Agents and Celo-native liquidity.
description: DiversiFi is an autonomous AI-powered financial guardian designed to protect wealth for users in volatile economies. It leverages Celo's Mento stablecoins and multi-chain RWAs to hedge against local inflation using culturally-aligned financial strategies like Africapitalism and Islamic Finance.
author: thisyearnofear

capabilities.name: Inflation Hedging
capabilities.description: Monitors macro-economic data and local inflation rates to recommend swaps into stable assets.

capabilities.name: Mento Native Liquidity
capabilities.description: Deep integration with Celo Mento for regional stablecoins (cUSD, cEUR, cKES, cGHS, cBRL, cREAL).

capabilities.name: Agent Fuel (Circle MPC)
capabilities.description: Autonomous gas management using USDC-funded sub-wallets, removing the need for users to hold native gas tokens.

capabilities.name: Cultural Financial Strategies
capabilities.description: Portfolio rebalancing based on 7 unique cultural philosophies including Africapitalism and Buen Vivir.

capabilities.name: Cross-Chain RWA Access
capabilities.description: Automated access to tokenized Gold, Treasury yields, and Commodities across Celo and Arbitrum.
